title: List of current Premier League and English Football League managers (L1 & L2)
text: Current League One and League Two Managers as of March 11, 2026. League One Managers: Dave Challinor (Stockport County) - appointed November 2, 2021; Richie Wellens (Leyton Orient) - appointed March 9, 2022; Johnnie Jackson (AFC Wimbledon) - appointed May 16, 2022; Grant McCann (Doncaster Rovers) - appointed May 12, 2023; Graham Alexander (Bradford City) - appointed November 6, 2023; Michael Skubala (Lincoln City) - appointed November 13, 2023; Alex Revell (Stevenage) - appointed April 17, 2024; Steven Schumacher (Bolton Wanderers) - appointed January 30, 2025; Gary Bowyer (Burton Albion) - appointed December 17, 2024; Jack Wilshere (Luton Town) - appointed October 13, 2025; Ian Evatt (Blackpool) - appointed October 21, 2025; Leam Richardson (Reading) - appointed October 28, 2025; Luke Williams (Peterborough United) - appointed October 29, 2025; Matt Taylor (Exeter City) - appointed March 3, 2026; Colin Calderwood (Northampton Town) - appointed March 9, 2026; Lee Clark (Rotherham United) - appointed March 18, 2026; Gary Caldwell (Wigan Athletic) - appointed February 16, 2026; Tom Cleverley (Plymouth Argyle) - appointed June 13, 2025; Brian Barry-Murphy (Cardiff City) - appointed June 16, 2025. League Two Managers: Andy Woodman (Bromley) - appointed March 29, 2021; Dean Brennan (Barnet) - appointed September 20, 2021; Paul Cook (Chesterfield) - appointed February 10, 2022; Lee Bell (Crewe Alexandra) - appointed November 4, 2022; John Doolan (Accrington Stanley) - appointed March 4, 2024; Danny Cowley (Colchester United) - appointed January 4, 2024; Karl Robinson (Salford City) - appointed January 5, 2024; David Artell (Grimsby Town) - appointed November 27, 2023; Micky Mellon (Oldham Athletic) - appointed October 13, 2023; Ian Holloway (Swindon Town) - appointed October 25, 2024; Matt Bloomfield (Oxford United) - appointed January 9, 2026; Matt Lawlor (Fleetwood Town) - appointed January 26, 2026; Gavin Cowan (Shrewsbury Town) - appointed January 29, 2026; Gareth Ainsworth (Gillingham) - appointed March 25, 2025; Paul Warne (Milton Keynes Dons) - appointed April 15, 2025; Martin Paterson (Notts County) - appointed June 22, 2025; Christian Fuchs (Newport County) - appointed November 20, 2025; Steve Cotterill (Cheltenham Town) - appointed September 30, 2025; Pete Wild (Tranmere Rovers) - appointed March 10, 2026; Darren Byfield (Walsall) - appointed March 11, 2026; Colin Kazim-Richards (Crawley Town) - appointed March 24, 2026; Stuart Maynard (York City) - appointed August 28, 2025; Steve Evans (Bristol Rovers) - appointed December 16, 2025; Jon Brady (Port Vale) - appointed January 6, 2026.
